violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas: -3-bay sink area floors -storage closet floor -underneath various equipment in front area have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Cups without handles are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

Exposed Wood is used in the construction in the main service area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Wood to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
The floors in the dry storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
